chunks.title: Beginning of the Temple Construction
chunks.reason: Introduces the location and timing of Solomon's building project.

chunks.title: Dimensions and Gold Overlay of the Temple
chunks.reason: Provides detailed measurements and descriptions of the materials used for the main structure.

chunks.title: The Holy of Holies and Cherubim
chunks.reason: Describes the specific furnishings, including the golden cherubim and the veil.

chunks.title: The Pillars Jachin and Boaz
chunks.reason: Details the construction and naming of the two pillars at the temple entrance.
